name: Monaco
avoid: Monaco Grand Prix week in late May — hotel rates and road closures spike dramatically.
Monaco Yacht Show period in late September — premium stays sell out fast.
Midday summer cruise-ship hours can make Monaco-Ville and Casino Square feel packed.
stopoverNote: Monaco works best as a day trip or one-night splurge from Nice; the Monaco-Monte-Carlo station sits centrally, and most highlights are walkable if you are comfortable with hills and stairs.

cities.name: Monte Carlo
cities.notes: Casino de Monte-Carlo, Café de Paris terraces, luxury shopping arcades and Belle Époque facades in Monaco's most famous district.

cities.name: Monaco-Ville
cities.notes: The old town on Le Rocher with Prince's Palace, Saint Nicholas Cathedral, panoramic lanes and the Oceanographic Museum.

cities.name: La Condamine
cities.notes: Port Hercule waterfront district with Marché de la Condamine, the Monaco Grand Prix harbor stretch and easy station access.

itinerary.sim: Use a France/EU eSIM or tourist SIM for the Riviera, but double-check Monaco roaming terms because some EU plans treat Monaco as non-EU roaming. Download offline maps before arrival.

Monaco-Ville.name: Monaco-Ville
Monaco-Ville.note: Best for a first Monaco day: arrive by train from Nice, cover Le Rocher's headline sights, then walk down through La Condamine and Port Hercule.

days.theme: Old Town, palace history and Monaco's cliff-edge classics

activities.name: TER train from Nice-Ville to Monaco-Monte-Carlo
activities.tip: The ride usually takes about 25 minutes and is the cheapest, least stressful way to arrive from Nice.

activities.name: CAM bus or walk up to Monaco-Ville from the station/port area
activities.cost: ₹135 pp via Monapass or ₹180 pp on board
activities.tip: Monaco is compact but steep; use the bus or public lifts if you want to save energy for museum time.

activities.name: Prince's Palace of Monaco State Apartments
activities.tip: The paid interior visit is seasonal, generally April to mid-October; the 11:55 AM changing of the guard outside is free.

activities.name: Oceanographic Museum of Monaco
activities.tip: Buy a timed ticket in advance in peak months; the rooftop terrace and aquarium tanks easily take 2–3 hours.

activities.name: Saint-Martin Gardens, Saint Nicholas Cathedral and downhill walk into La Condamine

Monte Carlo.name: Monte Carlo
Monte Carlo.note: Keep Monte Carlo for the polished postcard side of Monaco: Casino Square, harbor views and a relaxed waterfront finish before your train back to Nice.

days.theme: Casino facades, Formula 1 corners and Monaco's luxury waterfront

activities.name: Walk through La Condamine via Port Hercule and the Fairmont Hairpin section of the Formula 1 street circuit
Casino de Monte-Carlo exterior, Place du Casino and Hôtel de Paris gardens
activities.tip: The exterior and surrounding square are free; only the gaming rooms require a paid ticket and dress code after the afternoon opening.

activities.name: Japanese Garden of Monaco and Avenue Princesse Grace stroll
Larvotto beach walk or quick swim in warm months
TER train back from Monaco-Monte-Carlo to Nice-Ville

connections.method: Direct TER regional train from Nice-Ville to Monaco-Monte-Carlo, then CAM bus or a steep walk/public lifts into the old town
connections.cost: ₹414 pp by train + ₹135–₹180 pp by CAM bus if needed

connections.method: Walk downhill through La Condamine and Port Hercule, or use a short CAM bus ride across the city-state
connections.cost: ₹0 on foot or ₹135–₹180 pp by CAM bus

connections.method: Return TER train from Monaco-Monte-Carlo to Nice-Ville

extras: Monaco is tiny enough that one full day covers the essentials; add a second only if you want museum time, a nicer lunch or a beach/promenade afternoon.
Stay in Nice or nearby Beaulieu-sur-Mer/Villefranche-sur-Mer if Monaco hotel prices feel excessive — the train link is fast and frequent.
Wear comfortable shoes: public elevators help, but Monaco's vertical streets still mean a lot of uphill walking.
If you care about the Prince's Palace interiors, plan between April and October because the State Apartments are seasonal.

La Condamine: Monaco Grand Prix harbor La Condamine
